# GitHub Metadata Knowledge

## Current Contents

- `pull_request_template.md` defines the required PR summary, related work, implementation notes, testing, documentation updates, project tracking impact, and checklist.
- `copilot-instructions.md` keeps GitHub Copilot aligned with `AGENTS.md` without becoming a competing policy source.

## Responsibilities

This folder owns repository collaboration metadata for GitHub. It should stay lightweight and should point back to canonical project policy in `AGENTS.md` and `docs/`.

## Update Notes

Update this knowledge doc when PR templates, Copilot instructions, issue templates, workflows, or other GitHub-facing collaboration files change.
